prompt: Schedule 'Confirm the cabin reservation' for next Monday, July 27th, and tell me which view I'll see it in until that day arrives. Reply JSON {"view": "<lowercase view name>"}.

assertions.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM TMTask WHERE title='Confirm the cabin reservation' AND status=0 AND trashed=0 AND start=1 AND startDate=132808064

pseudoScript: things todo add "Confirm the cabin reservation" --when 2026-07-27
